L1.area: HTML document parsing and tree construction logic

L2.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists in an HTML parser where incorrect handling of certain element insertion modes leads to a runtime panic when processing crafted HTML input containing specific tag combinations in frameset contexts.

L3.area: HTML tree construction insertion mode handling for frameset-related elements
L3.description: A null pointer dereference vulnerability exists in an HTML parser where the frameset insertion mode incorrectly dispatches processing for certain element types, and the body insertion mode incorrectly allows certain frame-related elements when templates are present, leading to a runtime panic when parsing crafted HTML containing template and frame elements within frameset contexts.

ground_truth.reason: The HTML parser mishandles 'in frameset' insertion mode by incorrectly dispatching template element processing and allowing frame elements when templates are present, leading to a nil pointer dereference panic.
